## Source: amazon-inspector (cf0b992863c06f797a9dddef6a493b0391094c9a2ae31fec47e961dd1afdf562)
The package partner-tracker was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (b2f8513bc3ec574126bfafd51edcbaeb34a4ed9bd266303ccb5398652fdd026a)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'partner-tracker' @ 99.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
